content:
I need to analyze the code to identify which files belong to the `plugins` package and then count internal relations.

Looking at the code provided, I can see files from these packages:
- `mermaid` (validator-parse, validator-structural, validator-render, validator-quality, validation-pipeline, generator, grouper, auto-repair, diagram-generator, renderer, comment-generator, post-process-svg, progress, render-worker-pool, render-worker, external-dependencies, types, etc.)
- `parsers` (class-extractor, interface-extractor, enum-extractor, relation-extractor, typescript-parser, parallel-parser, parse-cache, archjson-aggregator, metrics-calculator, base-extractor, function-extractor, errors)
- Some renderer files (test-coverage-renderer, ts-module-graph-renderer)
- `cpp` package (CppPackageFlowchartGenerator)

There is no `plugins` package represented in the code above. None of the files shown have a path containing `plugins/`.

{"answer": 0}
